name: Ribollita
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium carrot (1/4-inch chopped into half moons)
3 Cups white cannellini or brown borlotti beans, soaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 8-quart pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add diced onion and garlic; cook until soft.
3. Stir in chopped carrots, celery, and cubed potatoes. Cook for about 5 minutes.
4. Add the soaked beans and their cooking liquid (or water), along with tomato sauce. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and add Swiss chard, kale, and black cabbage. Simmer for 1.5 hours until all vegetables are soft.
6. Stir in the remaining beans and adjust seasoning as needed. Let it rest overnight.
7. The next day, bring the mixture to a boil again. Serve in shallow bowls over toasted bread, sprinkled with grated parmigiano tableside.
Serves: 4
